arts.sum: Vinicius Junior RECORD transfer, Man Utd target Ten Hag REPLACEMENT: FootballTransfers Recap EXCLUSIVE: Marco Silva on shortlist for Man Utd should Ten Hag leave

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham gets the seal of approval from fellow Brummie Lee Carsley
arts.sum: The interim England boss says he has a good relationship with Real Madrid star Bellingham.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley makes worrying admission on Jude Bellingham, Phil Foden and Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Lee Carsley still insisted that having a wealth of riches in Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham, Manchester City’s Phil Foden and Chelsea’s in-form Cole Palmer is a “nice problem” to have

arts.ttl: Antonio Rüdiger calls Arsenal star to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Antonio Rüdiger has named a member of the defensive ranks at Premier League giants Arsenal as the one player he would bring to Spain’s capital, if afforded…

arts.ttl: 'Jude is not Jude!': Bellingham comes under fire after Real Madrid struggles
arts.sum: However, the 21-year-old has struggled to match his output this season, having yet to open his account after seven games in all competitions despite scoring six times in the same amount of appearances last year. Jude Bellingham is one of the front runners for this year’s Ballon d’Or but the Real Madrid star has already come under criticism for his ‘palpable’ decline this season.
